name: Jericho
oracleText:
Jericho enters the battlefield tapped.
{T}: Add {W} or {G}.
{2}{W}{G}, {T}: Create a 1/1 white Human Citizen creature token. If an opponent controls a creature with power 4 or greater, you gain 2 life.
flavorText: "Jesus, thou Son of David, have mercy on me." — Mark 10:47
notes: Created from a checked Messianic Fulfillment card list item; mechanics, colors, and art sourcing remain pending. Source boundary is anchored to Luke with Matthew, Mark, and John as support material per the Biblical-series timeline guide. Classics theme art uses James Tissot's "The Good Samaritan" via Wikimedia Commons. First-pass mechanics added in this pass; mana, colors, and rules text remain provisional.
title: Road of Mercy
